title: PHASE-11A Real-Corpus 30M Checkpoint Comparison
artifact_policy: Ignored corpus_v01 checkpoint artifacts are evaluated live when present. Fresh clones and CI use this committed summary and mark the row summary-only.
comparison_notes: PHASE-11A is a smoke-sized real-corpus path over corpus_v01 local artifacts, not a full quality claim.
The selected tokenizer is kgpt-corpus-v01-byte-bpe-4k from PHASE-10D; the smoke corpus caps the actual vocabulary at 312 tokens.
English and Japanese fixed prompts are educational probes used to observe training dynamics and failure modes.

checkpoints.label: PHASE-11A kgpt-30m corpus_v01 smoke
checkpoints.summary_source: experiments/runs/phase11a_kgpt30m_corpus_v01_smoke/manifest.json and metrics.jsonl generated during PHASE-11A validation
checkpoints.reproduce_command: uv run python -m train.pretrain --config configs/kgpt_30m_corpus_v01.yaml --max-steps 1000 --run-name phase11a_kgpt30m_corpus_v01_smoke
